t.t: Follow, view or review your case
Follow, view or review your investigation tor

div.style: background: #effafd; border:1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius:6px; padding:15px 20px; margin-bottom:15px;

div.div: Follow, View and Review your Cases

span.t-attf-class: badge p-1 fs-6 #{'bg-success' if project.priority == 'low' else 'bg-warning' if project.priority == 'medium' else 'bg-danger' if project.priority == 'high' else ''}

div.class: card bg-white shadow ps-3 pt-3 pb-3
d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center text-center text-primary pt-3 ps-3
badge bg-primary text-white fs-6 p-1 px-2

span.t-att-class: 'badge ' + ('bg-secondary' if case.status == 'draft' else 'bg-warning' if case.status == 'in_progress' else 'bg-success' if case.status == 'completed' else 'bg-light')

div.t-att-class: 'fw-bold text-center bg-white border ' + ( 'text-success border-success' if recom_action.status == 'completed' else 'text-warning border-warning' if recom_action.status == 'disputed' else 'text-secondary border-secondary' )

'border w-25 fw-bold text-center bg-white ' + ( 'text-success border-success' if recom_action.status == 'completed' else 'text-warning border-warning' if recom_action.status == 'disputed' else 'text-secondary border-secondary' )

main.span: By signing, you confirm acceptance on behalf of for the case.

main.p: Tell us why you are refusing this case, this will help us improve our services.

div.div:
Thank You!
Your case has been authorised.

div.a: Contact us to get a new quotation.

div.class: alert alert-warning border-start border-4 border-danger mb-4
d-flex align-items-center border rounded p-2 bg-light

div.t-if: current_request_item and current_request_item.state == 'sent' and sign_request.state in ['sent', 'shared']
